title: melica ciliata subsp. bauhini
intro: Melica ciliata subsp. bauhini, also known as Bauhini melica, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Melica ciliata subsp. bauhini can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
